The '''Babbs''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that were small in stature. Consequently, they were occasionally thought of in contrast to [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]].<ref name="Quest" /> In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref> a number of Babbs were present on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Euceron]], which was hosting the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]], and they were seen by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] on a landing pad.<ref name="Quest" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Babbs appeared in ''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'', a [[2002]] young readers novel written by [[Jude Watson]].<ref name="Quest" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{1st}}
